name: dual_arm_0001
prompt: The robotic gripper adjust the pillow on the bed.
prompt detailed: The robotic gripper, positioned in a neatly organized bedroom with a gray bedsheet and wooden headboard, carefully adjusts the patterned pillow to ensure it is properly aligned and centered on the bed. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The right robotic gripper opened the wardrobe and hung the pink hanger with pants inside.

prompt: The robotic gripper move the steak from the pink plate to the white plate.

name: dual_arm_0024
prompt: The robotic hand grasps the yellow bottle on the upper shelf and places it onto the table.
prompt detailed: The robotic hand carefully grasps the yellow bottle located on the upper shelf of the black rack and places it gently onto the wooden table, in an environment resembling a laboratory workspace with various equipment and objects arranged around the room. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: dual_arm_0033
prompt: The robotic hand places the bok choy inside the frying pan.

name: dual_arm_0040
prompt: The robotic hand places the tennis ball on the table.
prompt detailed: The robotic hand carefully places the tennis ball onto the plate set on the teal tablecloth, in a workspace surrounded by computer equipment and other technical tools. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper presses the button on the cash register.
prompt detailed: The robotic gripper, positioned in a monitored setting with a white table and a toy cash register, carefully aligns its movements to press the button on the cash register. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: dual_arm_0067
prompt: The robotic gripper selects a yellow tube of chips from the shelf and places it into the shopping cart.
prompt detailed: The robotic gripper, positioned near a well-stocked retail shelf filled with various colorful snack containers, carefully selects a yellow tube of chips from the neatly arranged rows and gently places it into the shopping cart below. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic gripper places a banana into the shopping cart.

prompt: The robotic arms adjusts its positioning mechanism with the orange fixtures.
prompt detailed: The robotic arms, operating within a clean and minimalistic indoor environment, precisely adjust their positioning system by manipulating the orange fixtures through controlled and synchronized movements. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic arms places the black object and the red object back into their respective boxes..
prompt detailed: The robotic arm, operating within a brightly lit exhibition setting showcasing various national flags, carefully places the black object into its designated box and the red object into its corresponding box, ensuring precise positioning and adherence to the organized setup. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

prompt: The robotic arms uses a pipette to transfer liquid into the test tubes.
prompt detailed: The robotic arm, operating in a clean and organized laboratory setting, carefully utilizes a pipette to precisely transfer liquid into the aligned test tubes. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: dual_arm_0090
prompt: The robotic arms lifts up the yellow corn and the apple from the table.
prompt detailed: The robotic arms, positioned in a well-lit workspace with a modern office setting in the background, carefully lift the yellow corn and the red apple from the white table surface while utilizing precision grips. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: dual_arm_0097
prompt: The robotic arms pour water from the bottle into the cup.
prompt detailed: Two robotic arms work together on a table. The right arm grasps a water bottle and tilts it to pour water, while the left arm holds the transparent cup steady underneath, ensuring the water flows smoothly into the cup without spilling. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.

name: dual_arm_0099
prompt: The robotic arms fold the clothes neatly on the table.
prompt detailed: Two robotic arms collaborate to fold a striped sweater placed on the table. The left arm lifts one side of the garment while the right arm folds the other side toward the center, working together to neatly align the sleeves and body of the clothing. Keep the first frame of this video unchanged.
